name: Two-Toned Grape Puff Pastry Tarts
recipeIngredient: 1 sheet frozen puff pastry, thawed (half pound)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. In a small bowl, scrape seeds from vanilla bean and stir in sugar and cinnamon.
3. On a lightly floured surface, roll out pastry about 1/8-inch thick. Cut into 4 rectangles (6 by 5 1/2 inches).
4. Fold edges on all sides to form a 1/2-inch border, leaving corners unfolded. Pinch corners and twist to make points.
5. Press points down on baking sheet. Prick the middle of each rectangle several times with a dinner fork.
6. Arrange grape halves in rows on pastry, alternating colors. Sprinkle sugar mixture over each tart.
7. Bake tarts in the middle of oven until pastry is golden brown (20 to 25 minutes).
8. Cool tarts for 5 minutes on a rack before brushing with apricot jam.
9. Serve tarts warm with ice cream.
Yield: 4 servings
